comment: Single source of truth for typed-ID prefixes used by newId(prefix). Each ID is `<prefix>_<base32-or-ulid>`. Prefixes are stable; renaming a prefix is a breaking change.

format.randomScheme: ulid (Crockford base32, 26 chars) — see 08-decisions/0001 for rationale

prefixes.comment: Default workspace ID; CE v0.1 ships exactly one.
Registration token (the row; the raw token value is generated separately via newToken('reg')).
Agent token (the row; raw token via newToken('agt')).
Capsule Service registered by an Agent.
Action declared on a service manifest.
Command for an Agent to execute.
Optional separate row for command results; CE v0.1 may inline into Command.
Health report snapshot (latest persisted per service).
Visible config item attached to a service manifest.

tokenPrefixes.comment: Wire format for raw registration token; backend stores only the SHA-256 hash.
Wire format for raw Agent token; backend stores only the SHA-256 hash.
